behavior_summary: Provides simple interaction handlers for a wall lamp item. When the player 'looks' at the lamp it emits a short identifying text ('wall lamp '). When the player 'uses' the lamp the script collects the lamp's map coordinates (X,Y,Z), adjusts X by -0x20 and invokes an engine routine (FREE::2411) with those coordinates and constants — inferred to spawn/trigger an object or effect near the lamp.
Both handlers set process/context info and exclude normal processing before performing their action to ensure the bark or engine call runs under the intended engine context.
No persistent global flags are read or written by these handlers in the provided excerpt.
notable_control_flow: LAMP1::look: set process/info context -> call Item::bark(this, "wall lamp ") -> free temporary string -> implies/pop return handling -> suspend.
LAMP1::use: set process/info context -> call Item::getZ/Y/X to read coordinates -> compute X-0x20 -> push (X-0x20, Y, Z, 0x00, 0x025E, item, context) -> call FREE::2411 -> return.
Both functions perform pre-call context setup (set info/process exclude) to guard their operations from normal processing.
open_questions: Exact semantics of FREE::2411: the call appears to spawn or trigger something at the provided coordinates (0x025E looks like an object/type id), but its precise effect is inferred.
Meaning and effect of the specific info/process-exclude values set before calls (what engine state key is being set and how it affects other systems).
Whether LAMP1::use is tied to a particular event id in the engine (Event 1/use is inferred from pattern but not explicitly labeled here).

main_function.name: U8P_LAMP1::look
main_function.purpose: When the player inspects (looks at) the wall lamp, present a short descriptive text ('wall lamp ') as an item bark and then suspend. Ensures the bark runs under the correct process/context.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_LAMP1::look) — triggered when the Avatar or relevant actor looks at or examines the wall lamp.

function_map.name: U8P_LAMP1::look
function_map.role: Handle the 'U8P_LAMP1::look' event for the wall lamp; present identifying bark text and suspend.

function_map.name: U8P_LAMP1::use
function_map.role: Handle the 'use' event: read lamp coordinates, adjust X, and call engine routine (FREE::2411) to spawn/trigger an effect/object near the lamp.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine to show/emit short text associated with an item (used by U8P_LAMP1::look to show 'wall lamp ').

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Return item Z coordinate (height) for use in spatial calls.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Return item Y coordinate for use in spatial calls.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Return item X coordinate; value is adjusted by -0x20 before use.

function_map.name: FREE::2411
function_map.role: Engine routine invoked with coordinates and constants; likely spawns, frees, or triggers an object/effect at or near the lamp (inferred).

external_calls.purpose: Display/emit the lamp's short identifying text 'wall lamp ' to the viewer/process.
Obtain the lamp's Z coordinate to pass to FREE::2411.
Obtain the lamp's Y coordinate to pass to FREE::2411.
Obtain the lamp's X coordinate, which is then adjusted (X - 0x20) before being passed to FREE::2411.
Invoke an engine routine with (X-0x20, Y, Z, 0x00, 0x025E, item, context) — likely to spawn or trigger an object/effect at or near the lamp; exact effect is inferred.
